name: drinkwars-web
description: Drink Wars — single-player in-browser prototype (engine + orchestration + adaptive NPCs, no backend).

scripts.deploy: VITE_ENABLE_MP=1 VITE_TRANSPORT_URL=https://kikmdmldfgakdabbsdcq.supabase.co/functions/v1/drinkwars vite build --base=/drinkwars/ && rm -rf ../../Webpage/drinkwars && cp -R dist ../../Webpage/drinkwars && echo 'Built into ../../Webpage/drinkwars (multiplayer enabled) — now commit & push the devinstein.me repo to go live.'
